creator: support@spectrum.ru
text:
I'm sorry,  but my last letter was uncorrect, I mean "Synopsis: Fix
MASTER_SITES, addition distribution kit for FreeBSD 6.1" in the
security/drweb port. This patch for update security/drweb port.

On Thu, 19 Oct 2006 09:20:15 GMT
FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Thank you very much for your problem report.
